creator: freebsd-bugs.statistic154@passmail.net
text: Hi, In section 3.2.1 of the Handbook [0], the link to the online man page of atkbd(4) is dead because of a superfluous colon after the command name. atkbd:(4) should be atkbd(4) Thanks! Marin [0]: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/basics/#consoles-virtual
